name: awen
long_description:
AI creative tools became powerful quickly. But they also got complicated. Most of them require creatives to do the engineering.

Prompts.
Parameters.
Node graphs.

Creative work doesn’t start there. It starts with thinking, exploring directions, and iterating on ideas. With Awen, we’re trying a different approach: 

A creative partner that turns intent into exceptional visuals through conversation.
one_liner: awen translates intent into exceptional visuals through conversation
